title: Interactive Exercise
description:
Create a BankAccount class with class and instance attributes:
- Class: bank_name, total_accounts
- Instance: owner, balance
- Class method to get total accounts
- Static method to validate amount
instructions:
Create a BankAccount class with class and instance attributes:
- Class: bank_name, total_accounts
- Instance: owner, balance
- Class method to get total accounts
- Static method to validate amount

hints.text: Use class attributes for bank_name and total_accounts. Use @classmethod for alternative constructors and @staticmethod for validation.

commonMistakes.consequence: Method doesn't receive class as first argument
Creates instance attribute instead of modifying class attribute
commonMistakes.correction: Use ClassName.attribute to modify class attributes
